completed_tasks: Rebranded UI from Docling FastAPI to DocuMark AI Core
Refactored App.tsx with useReducer for state management
Created electron/main.ts with Python backend auto-spawn
Fixed ENOENT path error in packaged mode (process.execPath)
Fixed 'Not allowed to load local resource' by disabling asar
Separated electron-builder output to release/ directory
Pushed all source code to GitHub
remaining_tasks: Verify packaged app opens correctly on Desktop (user needs to test)
Optional: Add custom .ico icon for Windows taskbar
decisions: asar: false — Chromium renderer cannot load file:// from inside asar archives
Output directory: release/ to avoid conflict with Vite's dist/
Python path: uses process.execPath in packaged mode to navigate back to project root
API_BASE_URL hardcoded to http://127.0.0.1:8000/api for Electron compatibility
next_action: User tests the Desktop shortcut 'DocuMark AI'. If it opens correctly with white page, check console for errors. If working, the project is complete.
context_notes: Three iterations of Electron packaging bugs were fixed: 1) ENOENT (wrong Python path), 2) asar file:// loading blocked by Chromium, 3) GitHub push rejected due to large binaries. All code is now on GitHub master branch.
